module.name: src
module.purpose: Second-generation Rust source organized into client, agent, and common modules with resolved typed configuration, folder-based chat message envelopes, centralized external-library namespaces, remoc-backed session/task endpoints, and a compact session-scoped agent loop engine draft API.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client-facing draft split into CLI and a remoc-backed core client session endpoint.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent public surface for compact loop engine interfaces, remoc-backed frontdoor session/task endpoints, model backend selection, and model backend implementations.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared interfaces used across the second-generation source tree, including typed TOML configuration, folder-based chat user messages, shared channel errors, remoc session protocol messages, and centralized crate-local external-library namespaces.
